testfall_name.label: Testfallname
testfall_name.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

testfall_beschreibung.label: Beschreibung
testfall_beschreibung.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).

software_version.label: Softwareversion
software_version.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

testdatum.label: Testdatum
testdatum.description:
A calendar date consisting of year, month and day (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29`.

prioritaet.label: Priorität
prioritaet.description:
One selected option of multiple available options (or `null`/`None`).

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be the key in this `lookup_data` attribute (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as radio button fields in HTML pages.

teststatus.label: Teststatus
teststatus.description:
One selected option of multiple available options (or `null`/`None`).

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be the key in this `lookup_data` attribute (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

testergebnis.label: Testergebnis
testergebnis.description:
One selected option of multiple available options (or `null`/`None`).

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be the key in this `lookup_data` attribute (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as radio button fields in HTML pages.

tester_vorname.label: Vorname des Testers
tester_vorname.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

tester_nachname.label: Nachname des Testers
tester_nachname.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

fehler_beschreibung.label: Fehlerbeschreibung
fehler_beschreibung.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).

screenshot.label: Screenshot / Anhang
screenshot.description:
An uploaded file (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be the URL to download the file in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/files/69c50bd3d38d8ccb727de8f4/data/<record-id>/<control-identifier>/<internal-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

anmerkungen.label: Anmerkungen
anmerkungen.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).
